data.title: Solana founder warns of quantum threat by 2030, urges Bitcoin to accelerate progress to stay ahead.
data.description: Anatoly Yakovenko, founder of Solana, predicts a potential quantum computing breakthrough by 2030 with a likelihood of "50/50." He emphasizes on the urgency for the Bitcoin community to accelerate progress in response to this forecast.

data.title: Artea Bank (ROE1L) partners with Kaunas Žalgiris basketball club in long-term strategy.
data.description: Artea Bank (ROE1L) announced on 19 September 2025 that it has initiated a long-term strategic partnership with Žalgiris Kaunas, a well-known team that competes regularly in the Euroleague basketball tournament and has secured multiple national championships.

data.title: The9 acquires JV to operate mobile games Ultraman: Hero Beyond Time and Glory All Stars. Nasdaq: NCTY.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Shanghai, The9 Limited (Nasdaq: NCTY), a well-known Internet firm, revealed that its wholly-owned branch, Shanghai The9 Information Technology Co., Ltd., has finalized a deal with Shanghai ZhongShun HengXin Network.

data.title: KDP intends to make a public offer for JDE Peet's, a joint press release by the companies on Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, a joint press release was issued by Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ: KDP) and JDE Peet's N.V. (EURONEXT: JDEP). The release originated from Burlington, Massachusetts, Frisco, Texas, and Amsterdam. The collaboration between KDP and JDE Peet's was declared in compliance with Section 7.
